name: 13 · Dynamic Form
description: An upstream script DESIGNS the form at runtime: a Python step emits a `form` block list (TaskStepConfig[]), and a HumanTask with `stepsRef = "design.form"` renders whatever it produced — no statically-authored steps. The operator fills it in, the End maps the answers back. Proves the agent/script -> dynamic form -> human submit -> answers loop. The same path an Agent node uses: it would emit `form` as a tool output instead of a script.
